title: Total Eclipse of the Heart
album: Faster Than the Speed of Night
why_this_song: Total Eclipse of the Heart by Bonnie Tyler (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "turn" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "turn" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "every" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "every" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Every now and then I fall apart

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Of listening to the sound of my tears
A total eclipse of the heart

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Total Eclipse of the Heart" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Total Eclipse of the Heart" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Total Eclipse of the Heart" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Total Eclipse of the Heart"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bonnie Tyler one question about "Total Eclipse of the Heart", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bonnie Tyler sobre "Total Eclipse of the Heart", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Total Eclipse of the Heart" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Total Eclipse of the Heart" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
